channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Margaret Atwood says the problem with AI is ‘garbage in, garbage out’
item.description: Maraget Atwood, the storied author of The Handmaid's Tale and The Blind Assassin, was interviewed as part of the Babell Literary and Cultural Festival in Porto, Portugal. As it usually does at these things, the issue of AI came up, and Atwood didn't mince words. According to Deadline's recap, Atwood said she'd used an AI […]

item.title: How to watch Croatia vs Ghana: Free Streams, TV Channels & Kick-Off time as Luka Modric and Co. target FIFA World Cup 2026 knockout phase
item.description: Here's how to watch Croatia vs Ghana for free online and from anywhere in the FIFA World Cup 2026, with both teams eyeing second place in Group L.

item.title: How to watch Panama vs England: Free Streams, TV Channels & Kick-Off time for FIFA World Cup 2026 as Three Lions hunt top spot in Group L
item.description: Here's how to watch Panama vs England for free online and from anywhere as the Three Lions aim to top Group L at the FIFA World Cup 2026.

item.title: Tesla settles lawsuit over fatal pedestrian crash involving Full Self-Driving
item.description: The lawsuit dates back to a deadly incident in Arizona in 2023.

item.title: 62 Last Minute Prime Day Weekend Deals: Up to 45% Off (2026)
item.description: Prime Day is officially over, but many of our favorite, hand-picked deals are still available through the weekend.

item.title: Is your World Cup stream buffering or dropping out? Use your VPN’s IP rotation tool to jump servers without breaking your connection
item.description: Streaming services are prone to block data center traffic in the middle of a broadcast – but some VPNs have a fix for the World Cup.

item.title: How to watch Panama vs. England online for free
item.description: How to watch World Cup for free. Live stream Panama vs. England in the 2026 FIFA World Cup for free from anywhere in the world.

item.title: Uber announces stronger background checks for drivers
item.description: The ride share company announced new criteria for permanent bans after recent sexual assault lawsuits.

item.title: Apple wants permission to buy memory from a blacklisted Chinese supplier
item.description: Apple is looking to alleviate some of the pressure on its supply chain by seeking an exception from the Trump administration to buy RAM chips from CXMT, a company blacklisted by the Pentagon over ties to the People's Liberation Army, according to the Financial Times. The skyrocketing prices of RAM and storage have driven Apple […]
